blended.narrative: Fernie Alpine Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,094 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
